vocab.meaning: tích lũy được (số lượng, khoảng cách)
vocab.example: I try to rack up at least ten thousand steps every day to stay in shape.
After a long day at the office, I usually head off for a brisk walk in the nearby park.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình vào (không khí, cảnh vật)
vocab.example: Walking allows me to soak up the vibrant atmosphere of the city at a slower pace.

vocab.meaning: làm mòn, làm hỏng (do dùng nhiều)
vocab.example: I walk so frequently that I tend to wear out my sneakers within just a few months.

vocab.meaning: đi dạo thong thả, nhẹ nhàng
vocab.example: On weekends, I love to amble along the riverbank to clear my head.

vocab.meaning: duỗi chân tay, vận động cho thoải mái
vocab.example: After sitting in front of a computer for hours, I really need to get outside and stretch out my legs.
By walking through the backstreets, I often stumble upon charming little cafes I’ve never seen before.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp tốc độ của ai đó
vocab.example: My father is a very fast walker, so I often struggle to keep up with him during our morning strolls.

vocab.meaning: đi tắt qua (để tiết kiệm thời gian)
vocab.example: I usually cut through the local university campus because it's a much more scenic route.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn, thả lỏng sau khi làm việc
vocab.example: A short walk in the evening is the perfect way for me to wind down before bed.
